headline: PayPal Lawsuits And Takeover Rumors Weigh On Governance And Valuation
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is facing multiple class action lawsuits tied to allegations of misleading statements about its business outlook and financial targets. Law firms claim PayPal misrepresented its growth prospects and execution on branded checkout initiatives during a period of operational underperformance and a CEO transition. The lawsuits arrive alongside ongoing market rumors that Stripe and other parties have explored potential takeover bids for PayPal. These developments...

headline: Exclusive-Fintech Pine Labs to launch stablecoin payments outside India, CEO says
summary: Pine Labs will launch a stablecoin-backed prepaid card across nine countries in the Middle East, Africa and Southeast Asia by the ‌end of April, the fintech firm's chief executive told Reuters, marking the first attempt by ‌an Indian payments major to tap the fast‑growing market.  The Temasek and Peak XV-backed company aims to launch in countries that have ​a "stablecoin-friendly stance", Amrish Rau said in an interview on Friday, without specifying which countries they would launch in.  Pine Labs does not plan to launch the product in India or China, Rau said.

The Temasek and Peak XV-backed company aims to launch in countries that have ​a "stablecoin-friendly stance", Amrish Rau said in an interview on Friday, without specifying which countries they would launch in.
